abilities.name: War Stance
abilities.details: Mars generates a stack of War Stance for each enemy hero damaged by his basic attacks and abilities, lasting for few seconds (maximum 10 stacks).[n]Each War Stance stack gains Mars bonus [ad]physical power[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]). At maximum stacks, the [bf]physical power[/] bonus is [bf]doubled[/].

abilities.name: Dominion
abilities.details: Mars swings his axe in a wide horizontal arc, emitting a shockwave that travels forward, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) and briefly [db]slowing[/] enemies hit.[n]At maximum War Stance stacks, Mars also follows up with a vertical shockwave that deals [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/] plus the target's [db]current health[/]) to all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Defy
abilities.details: Mars lets out a terrifying war cry, gaining increased [ar]physical resistance[/] and [mr]magical resistance[/] for a few seconds.[n]At maximum War Stance stacks, he also absorbs a portion of all incoming damage. When the effect ends, Mars [bf]heals[/] for a percentage of the damage absorbed.

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.details: Mars dashes to a target direction. Dash distance is increased when cast towards an enemy hero, but decreased when cast away from enemy heroes.[n]Upon arrival, Mars spins his axe around, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) to all nearby enemies.[n]At maximum War Stance stacks, Mars shreds the [db]physical resistance[/] of all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Conqueror
abilities.details: Mars unleashes his inner godhood, gaining maximum War Stance stacks and bonus [bf]physical piercing[/] for a few seconds.[n]If he secures a kill while Dominance is active, the duration is extended, and he gains a burst of [ms]movement speed[/].
